channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Novara Media: Supermarkets Revolt Over Labour Price Control Plans
item.description: Supermarkets Revolt Over Labour Price Control Plans

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Yvette Cooper condemns ‘appalling’ videos of Israeli minister taunting detained British nationals
item.description: Yvette Cooper condemns ‘appalling’ videos of Israeli minister taunting detained British nationals

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire for buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ after UK quietly eases strict sanctions
item.description: Starmer under fire for buying ‘dirty Russian oil’ after UK quietly eases strict sanctions

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Badenoch says Labour ‘just want a better salesman’. It would be a good start
item.description: Badenoch says Labour ‘just want a better salesman’. It would be a good start

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting warns Labour risks losing fight against nationalism
item.description: Streeting warns Labour risks losing fight against nationalism

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting warns Labour must ‘change course’ or risk handing election victory to Reform
item.description: Wes Streeting warns Labour must ‘change course’ or risk handing election victory to Reform

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Makerfield by-election date set as Andy Burnham eyes return to Westminster and Labour leadership challenge
item.description: Makerfield by-election date set as Andy Burnham eyes return to Westminster and Labour leadership challenge

item.title: BBC Politics: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
item.description: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): From fuel duty to sanctions, Kemi wants to make it clear how little she understands | John Crace
item.description: From fuel duty to sanctions, Kemi wants to make it clear how little she understands | John Crace

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – as it happened
item.description: Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – as it happened
